chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-212 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge For Non Prosecution. 21.08.2025 Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P. G assisted by Mr. Zain-ul- Abideen Abbasi, A.P.G. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G. -.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Instant petition has been listed by the office for non-prosecution, as the counsel has failed to supply the sets and process fees in the office for issuing notices to other side. However, perusal of prayer clause reveals that the petitioner is being harassed by the respondent No.1, SHO PS Saddar Kamber. Learned Asstt. A. G Sindh and learned Addl. P. G submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. The official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner and his family in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with direction to official respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner and legal protection would be provided to the petitioner in accordance with law. Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
